authority_boundary: Terminal Local Completion authority: this registry proves the local research candidate is blocked for publication. It cannot grant Anthropic permission, approve public release, waive privacy/legal review for publication, mutate Git, or create human publish authority.

evidence_refs: Owner verbal authorization 2026-07-21: Anthropic will not grant license/trademark permission and will not want cooperative publication; do not seek Anthropic permission; keep release blocked; runtime/monitoring unauthorized; Finish Line A local candidate is durable end-state.
decisions.subject: public repository name
decisions.value: No Anthropic-cooperative or Anthropic-branded public repository name. Remain unpublished. Any later independent-research publish requires a separate owner authorization and must avoid Anthropic trademarks/endorsement.

evidence_refs: Owner authorization 2026-07-22: copyright holder Lowell T Wong; Apache-2.0 software + CC BY 4.0 research prose.

decisions.subject: path-level software research and metadata licenses
decisions.value: Apache-2.0 for software, schemas, scripts, tests, configuration, and machine registries; CC BY 4.0 for original scholarly prose (docs/audit/research narrative paths per docs/LICENSE_MAP.md). Upstream and private trees not relicensed. Public READY remains blocked.
